commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens OpenAI model-auth bearer/OAuth eligibility to include `openai-audio-transcriptions` and updates media-understanding tests for explicit OAuth profiles and auto audio selection.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +52. Total +57 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows OpenAI audio passes `openai-audio-transcriptions` into `resolveApiKeyForProvider`, where OAuth is rejected for any OpenAI model API except `openai-chatgpt-responses`; the linked issue provides the matching sanitized error.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed to accept the restored OpenAI OAuth batch-STT contract and require contributor-provided live proof; no concrete code repair finding is present.
